titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 43: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 43. (A.R. No. B 43 of 1995-96.) TIRUVIŚALŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the bhiṭṭi portion running from north to west, Śivayōganāthasvāmi temple.

Damaged and incomplete. Records that the king Gaṇḍarādityaṉ Madhurāntakan alias Kōpparakēsarivarman had donated 602 kāśu for instituting an uttamāgram (daily feeding of brāhmaṇas) service for six brāhmaṇas by the temple servants in (the temple of) Parmēśvarar at Tiruviśalūr in Amaninārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna-brahmadēyam on the northern bank of the river (Kāvēri). With this amount several plots of land were purchased. Out of the total land purchased, ten mā was set apart for paying the iṟai on all the plots purchased and allotted for the above said services. It is also stated that 7 kāśu were set-apart for the vessels such as vaṭṭil (containers) tālam (plate) and chaṭṭuvam (ladle) for this purpose. Also states that a kāśu was earmarked for the stonemason who engraved the inscription on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmakku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu vaṭakarai tevatāna brahmadeyam Amaninārāyaṇacaturvvedimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūr parameśvarar Uttamāgra Ūṭṭuvippataṟkāka śrī kaṇḍarādityaṉ madhurān=takaṉāna śrīkopparakesaripanmar Itdevar perāle Ivvūr
tya śi ṇḍita keya mā Iddeva kanmikaḷe nicata maṟuvar brāhmaṇarai Ūṭṭuvippārāka Ivvū kaārampiccaṭṭut tūrppilt tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇac caturvveti bhaṭṭasomayāciyār vacam viṭṭatāka kāṭṭa Ippoṉ māṟil vanta kācu 5 10 8(1/2) Aimpatteṭṭaraiyum kappa Aṟṟava
AiñnuṟṟuRead aiññūṟṟunāṟpattu muṉṟarai svaratāya maṅkalattu tāmotirapaṭṭaṉ pakkal tiruvicalūraneṉ mel pakkattu vilaikoṇṭa nilamā mun_ṛumā nma(1/2) kaik kuṭutta kācu 8 10 7m Ittiruvicalūriṉ teṉpakkattu kāṭṭukkuṟi bhavarudrabhaṭṭaṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam � muṉṟu mā Araikkālinukku kuṭutta kācu 6 10 Aṟupatum Ittiruvicalūriṉ mel
lik koṉṟai cantraśekharakramavittaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa � Araikkālukkum Itiṉ vaṭamelpakkattu Ivaṉ pakkale vilai koṇṭa � Araikkaālukkum Āka kuṭutta kācu 9 10 3 toṇṇūṟṟu muṉṟum muḻaiyūr śrī koyiliṉ kiḻpakkattuk kiḷinallūrc cālāpattiṉ śrīdharaṉ surdhyanārāyaṉaṉumRead suryyanārāyaṇaṉumtampimārum pakkal vilaikoṇṭa �4 nāṉmāvarai
kkum Ivaṉiṭaiye vilaikoṇṭa puṟañceri Araikkāṇi muntirikai kuṭutta kācu 9 10 toṇṇūṟum Innilattil pattumāccey Iṟai Iḻittuvitukkāka Ivvūr sabhaiyārkku kuṭutta kācu 1araikkāl 5(1/2) Irunūṟṟu Ain=tarai Āṟuvaṟkum Uṇpitukku veṇkalam 6 Āṟum vaṭṭilāṟum Iṭṭuṭṭat tālam 1 ṟum caṭṭuvam 1 ṟukkumākak kuṭutta kācu 7 Eḻum kallil Ippaṭi Eḻuttuveṭṭum kaltaccanukkuk kuṭutta kācu 1 ṟumik kācuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
